text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hey! Don't you think I look super grown-up?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Since we had the day off yesterday, I was gonna
stay up all night! ♪ But when I talked to Nature...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: She said if I wanna be more mature, I should actually go to bed early!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I listened to her advice, and now my hair is as soft
as silk. I feel like I could fly to the moon! But first,
I'm gonna steal your heart!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Mayano Top Gun rested well, both
mentally and physically.
